definition: I2S intercepts real comparands at or near the target gate and splices them back as the valid/in-range/sibling-encoding value, actively biasing the corpus toward the opposite branch outcome from the one needed.

authoring_contract.goal: ONE parameterized template.c isolating this cluster's shared mechanism, with exactly ONE compile-time -D knob = the program-feature axis. params.json:parameter MUST name that macro; scan_values sweep it; fuzzers = involved_fuzzers; expected_direction = '<winner> > <loser>'.
authoring_contract.isolate: No partial-match coverage edges unless the mechanism IS a gradient (VP families). Keep the gate the only objective.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S splices valid-version comparands (magic 'lcms', version 0x03) back into the corpus, pulling seeds toward structurally-valid headers whose version byte stays <=0x09 and away from the >0x09 overflow side; winner reaches it by plain havoc.
signature.one_line: Version byte >0x09 gate; I2S steers corpus toward valid version bytes

analysis.summary_one_line: Profile version field's first file byte (offset 0x08) must exceed 0x09, i.e. an invalid/garbage version high byte.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The first byte of the ICC Header.version field at file offset 0x08 must be greater than 0x09 (e.g. 0x0a or 0x29) rather than a small valid version major number like 0x03; the input is otherwise a short, structurally-loose buffer rather than a large well-formed multi-tag profile.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Both value_profile winner seeds carry a byte > 0x09 at offset 0x08 (seed1 = 0x0a, seed2 = 0x29) so *pByte > 0x09 is true; the seeds are small (505 and 1832 bytes) loosely-structured buffers produced by plain havoc byte mutation, letting a high byte land in the version slot.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: All value_profile_cmplog blocking seeds hold the valid version byte 0x03 at offset 0x08 inside a complete 'lcms'-magic ICC header and are huge (25244 / 10346 bytes); I2S substitution drove them toward structurally-valid headers whose version major stays <= 0x09, so the branch condition is false.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: havoc-only: the winner value_profile reaches the >0x09 side by ordinary havoc byte mutation dropping a high byte into the version field, with no comparison-introspection mutator available to it. The loser value_profile_cmplog's extra input-to-state substitution stage splices logged comparand bytes (magic 'lcms', valid version) back into the input, pulling its corpus toward valid headers that keep the version byte small and never trip the branch — so the input-to-state delta actively diverts the loser away from this side (I2S-hurts), and the winner's success rests on plain havoc, not on any comparison-solving technique.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch tests the first byte of the version DWord against 0x09.
pByte points at the raw Header.version DWord passed before endian adjustment.
Winner value_profile resolves the branch in all trials while loser value_profile_cmplog is blocked.
The discriminating byte at file offset 0x08 is >0x09 in winners and 0x03 in all losers.
A winner seed carries 0x29 in the version-slot region and is a short loosely-structured buffer.
Loser seeds are large well-formed ICC profiles with the 'lcms' signature and valid version 0x03.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, so the winner cannot be using I2S.
value_profile_cmplog (the loser) is the fuzzer that adds I2SRandReplace.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where forcing the version-field byte at offset 0x08 to >0x09 still leaves value_profile_cmplog resolving as fast as value_profile (no I2S-induced divergence), or where value_profile fails to reach the branch despite small havoc-mutated inputs, would refute the I2S-hurts / havoc-only attribution.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2S actively pulls vpc toward valid small-version headers (rather than vpc merely being slowed by larger-corpus overhead) is inferred from seed structure, not directly observed in a lineage chain.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S copies in-range fixed-point operands from CMP intercepts back into the bluex field, biasing the corpus away from the overflow range that decodes to the error sentinel; naive's undirected havoc stumbles the bytes into that range without any such pull-back.
signature.one_line: Fixed-point overflow sentinel; I2S pulls bluex bytes toward valid range

analysis.summary_one_line: A length-32 cHRM chunk whose bluex fixed-point field (offset +24) overflows to PNG_FIXED_ERROR, which undirected havoc reaches but I2S steers away from.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A cHRM chunk of exactly length 32 (so png_handle_cHRM passes the length!=32 guard and reads all eight png_get_fixed_point values), with the bluex sub-field at chunk-data offset +24 carrying a 4-byte value that png_get_fixed_point rejects as PNG_FIXED_ERROR (an out-of-range/overflowing fixed-point integer).
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: naive's undirected havoc (ByteRand/ByteInc/Word/DwordAdd, BytesSet) freely drives the 4 bluex bytes into the overflow range that decodes to PNG_FIXED_ERROR; the winner takes the true side (T=12) and resolves in all 10 trials with avg 17 hits on the branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: cmplog's input-to-state substitution copies operands logged from the png_get_fixed_point comparisons back into the input, biasing the bluex bytes toward valid (non-error) fixed-point magnitudes, so the loser never takes the true side (T=0 F=42) and stays blocked in 8/10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The WINNER is naive, whose enabling technique is havoc-only: raw undirected byte mutation (Byte/Word/Dword adds, BytesSet) stumbles the bluex field into the overflow range that decodes to the error sentinel, with no comparison introspection. cmplog's extra input-to-state substitution stage is the technique delta and acts as the hindrance — it pulls bluex toward in-range operands seen at the fixed-point comparison sites and away from the error branch (I2S-anti). The winning mechanism credited here is havoc-only.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocking branch is the bluex==PNG_FIXED_ERROR test inside png_handle_cHRM and the globally-blocked side is the true branch.
Reaching the read of bluex requires the chunk to be exactly 32 bytes long.
bluex is decoded from the 4 chunk-data bytes at offset +24 via png_get_fixed_point.
The winner naive takes the true side at the blocker while the loser cmplog never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1283  T=12 F=17  T=0 F=42  xy.bluex  == PNG_FIXED_ERROR ||  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: naive resolves the branch in all 10 trials with avg 17 hits while cmplog is blocked in 8 with 0 hits.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: avg hitcount on branch: winner=17  loser=0

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair has naive as winner and cmplog as loser with delta I2S.
cmplog's distinguishing technique is I2SRandReplace, which substitutes one logged CMP operand at input offsets matching the other.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive uses only havoc and token mutators with no I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic cHRM-style harness in which forcing bluex to an in-range value seen at the comparison (so I2S can substitute it) does NOT reduce cmplog's true-branch rate relative to naive — i.e. cmplog reaches the overflow/error branch as often as naive — would refute the I2S-steers-away mechanism.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The actual cHRM bytes are beyond the 0x40-byte seed window shown, so I infer the PNG_FIXED_ERROR overflow at offset +24 from source semantics rather than from a direct W-vs-L byte diff at the bluex offset.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged operands into the corpus, diverting mutation energy toward sibling encoding magic constants (e.g. UTF16BE), so the loser resolves a different gate rather than assembling the UCS4_2143 00 00 3C 00 window; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient climbs toward it without that diversion.
signature.one_line: 4-byte UCS4_2143 magic; I2S diverts corpus to sibling encoding gates

analysis.summary_one_line: First 4 input bytes consumed by xmlDetectCharEncoding must equal the UCS4_2143 magic prefix 0x00 0x00 0x3C 0x00.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte window read by xmlDetectCharEncoding(start, 4) must hold exactly in[0]==0x00, in[1]==0x00, in[2]==0x3C, in[3]==0x00 (the UCS4_2143 magic) while NOT matching any earlier 4-byte encoding gate (e.g. 00 00 00 3C for UCS4BE) tested before line 958.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the true side in 9/10 trials; its CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs whose CMP operands move bucket-by-bucket toward the 00 00 3C 00 constant, and winner-resolving seeds carry runs of 0x00 bytes (e.g. offsets 0x15-0x17 = 00 00 00) that the gradient feedback assembled into the magic prefix.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks the true side in 8/10 trials and spends 18.00h blocked; adding the I2SRandReplace stage diverts mutation energy into splicing logged operands, and the loser-blocking seeds instead resolve the sibling UTF16BE gate (line 980, tagged [L]) so they never present the 00 00 3C 00 window to line 958.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance bucket feedback) lets it climb toward the 4-byte magic constant incrementally; value_profile_cmplog adds the input-to-state substitution stage which here diverts effort and the pair regresses, so this is an I2S-hurts case where the winning technique is the CMP_MAP gradient, not comparison-solving substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the UCS4_2143 magic gate requiring bytes 0x00 0x00 0x3C 0x00 at the detection window.
The detection reads exactly the first 4 input bytes via xmlDetectCharEncoding(start, 4).
value_profile resolves the true side in 9/10 trials while value_profile_cmplog blocks it in 8/10.
The loser spends far longer blocked on this branch than the winner.
Winner-resolving seeds contain runs of 0x00 bytes that build toward the magic prefix.
value_profile resolves the true branch while value_profile_cmplog does not at line 958.
Loser-blocking inputs resolve the sibling UTF16BE gate at line 980 instead of the UCS4_2143 gate.
value_profile's instrumentation is the CMP_MAP gradient keyed by operand-distance bucket.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
each CMP callback writes into a `CMP_MAP` keyed by (PC, operand-distance
bucket).

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator; value_profile_cmplog adds it.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the exact 00 00 3C 00 magic gate where value_profile_cmplog reaches the true branch as fast as or faster than value_profile across trials would refute the I2S-hurts attribution and the CMP_MAP-gradient-only mechanism.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: The dataflow link between the 0x00 runs in winner seeds and the precise 4-byte detection window is inferred from byte content, not directly traced through the start[] buffer fill at the call site.

signature.mechanism_summary: I2S splices logged exact-literal comparands ('<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE') back into the corpus, biasing seeds toward completing those multi-byte gates and the CDATA state machine rather than taking the false-side general-parse path; value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient diversifies content leads without that pull.
signature.one_line: 9-byte CDATA literal AND-chain false side; I2S biases corpus toward CDATA entry

analysis.summary_one_line: Resolving the false side needs content bytes that are NOT a full '<![CDATA[' literal, reached by broad parsing progress rather than exact-literal CDATA matching

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A '<'-led content byte stream whose bytes 1-8 do NOT spell '![CDATA[' (or a non-'<' content lead), so the 9-clause AND at L11747-11754 short-circuits to its false side and the parser keeps advancing through general START_TAG / CONTENT parsing instead of entering the CDATA-section state machine.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves the branch in 9/10 trials; its winning seed reaches the false-side START_TAG path ([W] lines 11604-11620 and the goto-done at 11500/11639) and never enters the [L] CDATA-section block, meaning the 8-byte CDATA literal was not matched so the false side was taken.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks 8/10; its loser seed funnels into the [L] '<?xml' declaration and '<!DOCTYPE' / CDATA-section paths (L11555-11591, L11813-11903, L11950-11984), spending energy completing exact multi-byte literal matches and the CDATA term scan rather than diversifying content to take the false side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile (winner) uses CMP_MAP distance-bucket gradient feedback over edge coverage and lacks the input-to-state substitution mutator; it explores diverse content leads and rides the false side. value_profile_cmplog adds the input-to-state substitution mutator, which splices logged comparands (e.g. the '<![CDATA[', '<?xml', '<!DOCTYPE' literals it intercepts) back into the input, biasing its corpus toward completing those exact-literal gates and the CDATA state machine — diverting energy away from the false-side general-parse progress. The delta is I2S and the winner is the no-I2S variant, so the winner's progress is driven by CMP_MAP gradient feedback while I2S is a net liability here, not an asset.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of an 8-deep per-byte AND chain matching the literal '<![CDATA['.
The decisive pair is value_profile beating value_profile_cmplog with the technique delta being I2S.
The winner resolves the branch in 9/10 trials while the loser blocks in 8/10.
The winner-only path takes the START_TAG general-parse branch off the CDATA gate's false side.
The loser-only path enters the CDATA-section state machine (the true side of the literal gate).
The loser also spends energy on the '<?xml' declaration exact-literal path that the winner does not.
value_profile uses CMP_MAP gradient feedback and has no I2SRandReplace mutator.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the value_profile feature set.
The loser invokes the CDATA literal-check and lookup-string functions that the winner barely touches, evidencing wasted effort on the structured-literal paths.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same 8-byte CDATA literal gate where adding I2SRandReplace to value_profile makes the false-side branch resolve EQUALLY FAST or FASTER (no penalty), showing I2S is not diverting energy from false-side progress.

analysis.weakest_evidence_point: Whether I2S substitution in vpc actively diverts energy (corpus pollution) versus the divergence being noise/variance is not directly proven; the byte diff shows the two seeds are structurally unrelated rather than a single offset flip, so the dataflow story rests on path-coverage inference, not a clean byte-level contrast.
